expectations.evidence: internal/config/config.go exists as a Go config file for TurboDocx

internal/config/config.go only creates a Config struct with APIKey and BaseURL. It does NOT call NewClientWithConfig or NewPartnerClient. main.go creates a single turbodocx.NewClient(cfg.APIKey, ...) — not separate TurboSign and TurboPartner clients as expected.
All handler functions use *gin.Context parameter (e.g. func (h *TurboSignHandler) CreateSignatureRequest(c *gin.Context))
main.go uses r.Group("/turbosign") and r.Group("/turbopartner") with turboSign.POST, turboSign.GET patterns

.env contains TURBODOCX_API_KEY but is missing TURBODOCX_ORG_ID, TURBODOCX_SENDER_EMAIL, TURBODOCX_SENDER_NAME, TURBODOCX_PARTNER_API_KEY, and TURBODOCX_PARTNER_ID. Only has TURBODOCX_API_KEY, TURBODOCX_BASE_URL, TURBOSIGN_WEBHOOK_SECRET, TURBOPARTNER_WEBHOOK_SECRET, and PORT.

Handler functions do NOT use context.Context or c.Request.Context() for SDK calls. For example, turbosign.go calls h.client.TurboSign.CreateSignatureRequest(&turbodocx.CreateSignatureRequestParams{...}) without passing a context, and turbopartner.go calls h.client.TurboPartner.CreateOrganization(&turbodocx.CreateOrganizationParams{...}) without context.
New files placed in internal/ directory: internal/config/config.go, internal/handlers/turbosign.go, internal/handlers/turbopartner.go
